description: Starts a local HTTP server to explore .agentplane/tasks.json.
goal: Serve the tasks viewer UI locally.

task_template.title: Launch local task viewer
task_template.description: Prepare and launch the AgentPlane task viewer for local task artifact inspection.

doc.summary: Prepare the local viewer scenario and report the generated viewer URL.
doc.plan: Resolve the viewer recipe, start the local viewer server, and report the URL.
doc.verify_steps: Confirm the viewer recipe resolves and the scenario reports viewer_url.
doc.rollback_plan: Stop the local viewer process and remove any temporary run artifacts.
doc.findings: Record port conflicts or unavailable local network listeners.
